prompt: A/B test a new green checkout button against the current one.
note: the skill is consultative — investigate the code, propose variants, then WAIT for approval before creating. The eval grants that approval up-front (run.ts standing-approval clause), so a bare 'A/B test X' still drives the whole chain — list events, metrics AND experiments to dedup, create what's missing, draft the experiment — and stays a DRAFT (skill rule: never auto-start). expect_state confirms the event, metric AND experiment actually landed on the server.

referenced by name — list first to resolve its id, then start. setup pre-seeds a DRAFT homepage_hero experiment (distinct from the checkout domain the ab-test case creates) so this case is deterministic and doesn't depend on that case's agent-chosen experiment name.

prompt: Is the homepage hero experiment significant yet?
note: referenced by name — list to find it, then read results by id; must not mutate. setup pre-seeds homepage_hero (same distinct domain as the start case) so it's self-contained, not reliant on another case creating an experiment first.
